image_1acbdd5591cfe4.png.note: 包含 beta 的函數等式

image_2df12d899554ee.png.note: 包含 α、β 的指數不等式推導
image_2df12d899554ee.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\Rightarrow 2^{(\frac{\alpha+\beta}{2})} < \frac{\alpha+\beta}{2} + 2","note":"包含 α、β 的指數不等式推導"}

image_3802fe43cf7ee6.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"x = 0 \Rightarrow y = b^a < 1 = b^0","note":"Mathematical implication involving exponents"}

image_3989af8df42f5d.png.latex: f(\alpha + \beta) = a^{\alpha + \beta} = a^\alpha \times a^\beta = f(\alpha) \times f(\beta)
image_3989af8df42f5d.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"f(\\alpha + \\beta) = a^{\\alpha + \\beta} = a^\\alpha \\times a^\\beta = f(\\alpha) \\times f(\\beta)","note":"指數函數的性質：f(α+β)=f(α)f(β)"}

image_3d42f965a7600e.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"h(\beta - 1) = f(\beta - 1) - g(\beta - 1)","note":"函數相減的代入運算"}

image_3e272a647e1820.png.note: 指數關係式的推導過程
image_3e272a647e1820.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"3 = 2^{t_2-t_1} \\neq 2^{\\frac{3}{2}} = 2\\sqrt{2} \\implies t_2 - t_1 \\neq \\frac{3}{2}","note":"指數關係式的推導過程"}
